headings.usage: All headings (h1-h6). Use 900 for Hero, 700 for Section Titles.

typography.instructions: Add 'Outfit' font from Google Fonts to index.html: <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;700;900&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>

primary.name: Jalisco Forest Deep
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Key Brand Elements

background.name: Warm Limestone
background.usage: Page Background (Light Mode Only). Avoid pure #FFFFFF.

colors.theme_strategy: Light Mode Focused (Nature/Daytime feel). Dark mode exists but primary experience is Light.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1a4d2e] text-white hover:bg-[#143d23] rounded-full px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-xs transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1a4d2e] border border-[#1a4d2e]/20 hover:bg-[#fafaf9] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all

cards.company_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-xl hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-1
cards.image_behavior: aspect-[4/5] or aspect-[16/9] object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-110

navigation.classes: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 rounded-full px-6 py-3 flex items-center gap-8

hero_section.text_overlay: absolute bottom-12 left-4 md:left-12 z-20 max-w-4xl

inputs.classes: rounded-full border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a4d2e] focus:border-transparent px-6

motion.scroll_reveal: Use IntersectionObserver to fade-in elements upwards (translate-y-10 -> 0, opacity-0 -> 1)

hero_nature.description: Agave field with mountains - Perfect for Main Hero

adventure_activities.description: Lake and mountains - For 'Water Activities' category

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add Google Fonts link for 'Outfit' and 'Inter' in public/index.html immediately.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to extend colors with the specific hex codes provided above.
NAVIGATION: Create a 'FloatingNav' component that lives outside the main page flow, fixed at the top.
HERO: The Hero section must use the 'Agave' image as a full-screen background. Text should be bottom-left, massive (text-6xl md:text-8xl).
CARDS: Do not use standard Shadcn cards. Build custom cards using the classes provided in 'component_guidelines.cards'.
MASONRY: For the catalog, try to use a masonry layout library or a smart CSS column strategy (columns-1 md:columns-2 lg:columns-3) to prevent gaps.
RICH TEXT: Use a simple wrapper around 'react-quill' or 'tiptap' for the blog editor.
WHATSAPP: The floating button must be green (#25D366) but follow the 'floating' shadow style defined in visual_enhancers.
DATA-TESTID: Ensure every button, input, and card has a unique data-testid.
universal_guidelines: Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
Every hover state must include a scale or translate transform.
Never use generic blue for primary actions.
